data.description: US Navy: Aircraft carrier Ford prepares to rejoin operations in Iran.

data.title: Johnston Tobey Baruch Attorneys Earn Repeat Honors from Super Lawyers
data.description: Three distinguished Johnston Tobey Baruch shareholders, Randy Johnston, Robert Tobey, and Chad Baruch, have been honored in the 2026 edition of Texas Super Lawyers. This recognition underscores their expertise in professional liability and appellate law. Selected through rigorous selection processes involving independent research and peer evaluations, being included in this prestigious list signifies being among the top 5% of attorneys in the state. This recognition marks a continuation of their long-standing acknowledgment for their exceptional legal work.

data.title: Ed Morse Automotive Group Acquires the Iconic Porsche Des Moines Dealership in West Des Moines
data.description: A prominent automotive group, Ed Morse Automotive Group, has recently purchased the esteemed Porsche Des Moines dealership in Iowa. Situated at 7220 Lake Drive in West Des Moines, the sole authorized Porsche dealership in Iowa now belongs to Ed Morse Automotive Group after being acquired from Woodhouse Auto Group of Omaha. The acquisition was facilitated by Wes Hamilton from Pinnacle Mergers and Acquisitions. Porsche Des Moines boasts a cutting-edge facility for Porsche enthusiasts.

data.title: Frontera Announces Filing and Mailing of Information Circular and Receipt of Interim Order in Connection With Plan of Arrangement With Parex
data.description: Frontera Energy Corporation (TSX: FEC) has announced a special shareholder meeting set for April 30th, 2026 to vote on the Parex Arrangement and Return of Capital. Following this, an annual meeting is scheduled for the Parex Arrangement in Calgary, AB. Investors will convene to make decisions about the company's future, including significant financial matters. The meeting is crucial for stakeholders as they consider the key proposals on the agenda.

data.title: Service Properties Trust Announces Closing of Underwritten Public Offering and Full Exercise of Option
data.description: In Newton, Mass., Service Properties Trust (Nasdaq: SVC) has successfully completed an underwritten public offering of 479.2 million common shares of beneficial interest. This total includes 62.5 million common shares issued due to the underwriters exercising their option to purchase additional shares in full. The shares were sold at a public offering price of $1.20 per share, not accounting for underwriting discounts and commissions. The net proceeds from this offering amounted to approximately 579.4 million dollars for Service Properties Trust.

data.title: Polymarket now offers trading in equities and commodities with Pyth price feeds, automating settlement using Pyth data.
data.description: A new prediction market is launching price-based contracts linked to stocks and commodities, utilizing Pyth data feeds as the source for automatically settling outcomes.

data.title: CFTC takes legal action against 3 states for prediction market rules. Commission got recognition in 1992, holds exclusive authority.
data.description: In 1992, the Commodity Futures Trading Commission formally acknowledged event contracts, marking a significant regulatory milestone. Congress has since vested the Commission with exclusive jurisdiction over the market, granting it full authority in this realm.

data.title: Platform considers changing guidelines for initial crypto mentions after tortoise scam; new rules may require account verification - X executive.
data.description: In a recent development, it has been stated by an executive that the well-known social media platform is considering implementing a measure wherein accounts discussing cryptocurrency could potentially be locked for the very first instance. This decision comes in the wake of a fraudulent incident where a scammer falsely reported the demise of a tortoise. As a precautionary step, the platform might also introduce a mandatory verification process for users involved in such discussions. This move aims to combat misinformation and deceit on the platform and protect users from falling victim to fraudulent schemes.

data.title: Company sold $289M in BTC with average of $76,626 per 3,778 coins as Q1 output drops 4% to 1,473 coins. Hash rate rose 26%, treasury shrank 18%. Miners shift focus to AI.
data.description: During the recent period, RIOT has divested 3,778 BTC at an average price of $76,626 per coin, alongside a decrease in Q1 production to 1,473 coins. The hash rate surged by 26%, however, the treasury diminished by 18% as miners shifted focus towards AI technologies.

data.title: Omnicom Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: On April 2, 2026, Omnicom (NYSE: OMC) announced that it will release its Q1 2026 financial results on April 28, 2026, following the closing of the New York Stock Exchange. A conference call is scheduled for the same day to discuss the company's performance.
MORGAN STANLEY CHINA A SHARE FUND: ACCEPTS 3.4 MLN SHARES AT $19.1287/SHARE FROM 14.4 MLN TOTAL TENDERED IN TENDER OFFER

data.title: New NVIDIA VC-6 batch mode reduces AI image decoding times by 85%, achieving submillisecond speeds for 4K images.
data.description: NVIDIA has improved its VC-6 batch mode to enable decoding of 4K images in less than a millisecond, resulting in a significant 85% speed enhancement for per-image processing in AI training workflows. This optimized approach promises faster performance for AI models and training pipelines.

data.title: PartnerOne Completes the Acquisition of Mortgage Cadence
data.description: In Riverside, California on April 2, 2026, PartnerOne, a rapidly expanding enterprise software conglomerate, has successfully finalized its acquisition of Mortgage Cadence, a top provider of cloud-based digital lending solutions. This acquisition marks a significant milestone for PartnerOne as it further solidifies its position in the global market.

data.title: Trilogy Metals Reports First Quarter Fiscal 2026 Results and Provides Update on U.S. Federal Strategic Investment and Project Advancement
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, Trilogy Metals Inc. (TSX: TMQ) (NYSE American: TMQ) has released its financial report for the initial quarter concluding on February 28, 2026. The company, known as Trilogy Metals, shared an update concerning a strategic investment from the U.S. federal government, as well as a project update.

data.title: Sensofusion Introduces Sensofusion Aviation, Taking Counter-Drone Systems to the Skies
data.description: A quickly expanding Finnish defense technology firm, Sensofusion, has recently bought the Finnish aircraft manufacturer Atol Aviation. This acquisition adds aircraft and unmanned aircraft manufacturing knowledge and production capability to Sensofusion, enhancing its capability for air-to-ground sensor reconnaissance. Atol Aviation is situated in Halli, Finland, on a former Finnish Air Force base. The acquisition provides Sensofusion access to the Atol Aurora amph aircraft and expands their operations significantly.

data.title: YouCam Unveils Egg-citing 2026 Easter Digital Experiences with AI-Powered Creativity
data.description: Perfect Corp. has launched its 2026 Easter digital content collection on YouCam apps, offering 39 engaging experiences for users worldwide. The collection aims to inspire creativity and celebration among its global community. The leading AI and AR beauty and fashion technology provider, known for its ‘Beautiful AI’ solutions, invites users to partake in the seasonal festivities through a variety of features within YouCam Makeup, YouCam Perfect, and other apps in the suite.

data.title: MetLife Investment Management Names Andrea Drasites Head of Real Estate and Agricultural Finance
data.description: MetLife Investment Management (MIM), the institutional asset management business of MetLife, Inc. (NYSE: MET), has appointed Andrea Drasites as the new global head of Real Estate and Agricultural Finance, starting October 1, 2026. Drasites will report to Brian Funk, president of MIM. According to Funk, Drasites' extensive leadership background and expertise in real estate make her an ideal fit for the role. The company is looking forward to her contributions in leading the Real Estate and Agricultural Finance division.

data.title: One805LIVE! Expands 2026 Lineup with Kevin Costner & Modern West
data.description: One805LIVE! has revealed a new addition to its lineup of performers for the annual benefit concert taking place at Kevin Costner's oceanside estate in Summerland, Santa Barbara. Alongside previously announced acts Pat Benatar & Neil Giraldo and George Thorogood, the event is expanding into a two-day concert experience. This announcement comes ahead of the event scheduled for April 2, 2026.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Can't Push Higher; S&P 500, Nasdaq Squeeze Out Gains (Live Coverage)
data.description: On Thursday, the Dow Jones Industrial Average experienced a slight decrease despite a speech by President Trump regarding Iran that led to an increase in oil prices. Additionally, a particular medical device company saw a decline in its stock value. The stock market showed mixed results, with the Dow unable to make significant gains while the S&P 500 and Nasdaq managed to edge higher. Live coverage of these market movements was provided by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Weatherford Announces Proposal to Redomesticate to the United States, Establishing Texas as New Legal Domicile
data.description: The decision to restructure Weatherford marks another step in the company's commitment to its free-cash-flow-focused approach. Through this move, Weatherford aims to optimize its corporate structure, improve its ability to manage capital effectively, and ultimately create lasting value for shareholders. This strategic decision demonstrates Weatherford's dedication to maximizing efficiency and profitability.
